text:
Once upon a summer day in a quaint forest bordering the village of Elderglen, there was a curious little squirrel named Whiskerbeam. Whiskerbeam didn't have many friends, but he wasn't lonely. Every morning, he'd hop up beside the old oak tree at the forest's edge and watch the forest come to life with birdsong.

Today was different. A family of ducks wobbled down from the lake towards the trees. Their glossy green feathers caught the sunlight, creating rainbow stripes across the water.

"Hello!" called Whiskerbeam bravely.

The ducks didn't look up. Their beaks were busy cutting breadcrumbs.

"You seem alone... Why don't you come with us?"

Whiskerbeam tilted his head. "I... I prefer not to fly."

The ducks didn't seem fooled. They flapped away, mumbling something about ducks needing their breakfast. Still, Whiskerbeam couldn't quite understand them.
